title: Submit a Recipe — Form
description: Add a recipe submission form to your site. Include an h2 'Submit a Recipe', a form element with: a text input for recipe name (with label, required), a select dropdown for category, a textarea for the description (with label), and a submit button. Each input should have a matching label.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 7: Recipe Submission Form # Add a form with labeled inputs: text, select, textarea, and submit button. html = """ My Recipes

My Recipe Collection

  • Home
  • Recipes
  • Submit Recipe

Welcome to my favorite recipes!

Classic Pancakes

Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast.

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup milk

Instructions

  1. Mix dry ingredients
  2. Add wet ingredients and stir
  3. Cook on a hot pan until golden

Garden Salad

A fresh and healthy salad with seasonal vegetables.

Ingredients

  • Mixed greens
  • Cherry tomatoes
  • Cucumber

Instructions

  1. Wash and chop vegetables
  2. Toss together in a bowl
  3. Add dressing and serve

© 2026 My Recipe Collection

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '<form' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <form> element'
assert '</form>' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing </form> tag'
assert '<input' in html.lower(), 'Must include at least one <input> element'
assert '<select' in html.lower() and '</select>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <select> dropdown'
assert '<textarea' in html.lower() and '</textarea>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <textarea> element'
assert '<label' in html.lower(), 'Must include <label> elements for inputs'
assert html.lower().count('<label') >= 2, 'Must have at least 2 labels'
assert 'submit' in html.lower() or '<button' in html.lower(), 'Must include a submit button'
assert 'required' in html.lower(), 'Must have required attribute on the recipe name input'
assert 'class="recipe-card"' in html.lower() or "class='recipe-card'" in html.lower(), 'Must keep recipe cards from previous step'
acceptance_criteria: A form element contains all input fields
Text input for recipe name with a label and required attribute
Textarea for recipe description with a label
At least 2 labels are used for form fields
Recipe cards from previous step are preserved
hints: Label with input: <label for="name">Recipe Name:</label><input type="text" id="name" required>
